programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A quirky couple in Austin, Texas, looks for a bigger home and struggles to agree on how much to spend; he needs plenty of space for his robots, and she wants a dedicated room where she can foster kittens.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A law school grad who is about to take the bar exam wants to buy a fixer-upper in Orlando, Fla., but her opinionated mom thinks taking on a project is a bad idea.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: She wants a move-in ready place with plenty of rooms for her hobbies, but he works in construction and just wants a place with a workshop.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.sub_title: Every Dog Has Its Day in Denver
programs.desc: A newlywed couple looks for their first home together so they can adopt dogs in Denver; they're looking for a home in a traditional neighborhood with a big yard and he doesn't mind doing renovations, but she doesn't want any big projects.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A young buyer in the Boston area has been living with her parents for four years to save for a place; everyone's eager for her to get out on her own, but her father's fixation with the safety of old New England properties slows them down.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programs.sub_title: A Couple From Jersey Escapes to Beautiful St. Croix
programs.desc: Tired of its cramped abode, even though the place is rent-free, a couple wants to find a dream home on the water in St. Croix.
